description: You are assisting a molecular and cellular biologist with a dataset quality control task for a hemoglobin comparative study. Identify and remove the non-homologous cytochrome protein contaminant from the mixed protein sequences found in ~/UGENE_Data/qc_analysis/mixed_protein_sequences.fasta. Create a cleaned multiple sequence alignment of the remaining homologous sequences. Export the resulting alignment in ClustalW format to ~/UGENE_Data/qc_analysis/results/cleaned_alignment.aln and in FASTA format to ~/UGENE_Data/qc_analysis/results/cleaned_alignment.fasta. Additionally, write a QC report to ~/UGENE_Data/qc_analysis/results/qc_report.txt that specifies the accession number of the removed contaminant, the justification for its removal, and the final count of sequences in the cleaned dataset.
